samples.text: A light is completely on and completely off at the same moment in the same way. Is this logically consistent?
A light is fully on and fully off at the same instant in the same sense. Does this make logical sense?
A lamp is entirely on and entirely off at once in the same way. Is this logically consistent?
On and off in the same sense at the same instant are mutually exclusive. They cannot both hold. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A light is completely on and completely off at the same moment in the same way. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Is this logically consistent?
